description_long: This is a modern entertainment console with a rectangular, minimalist design, featuring a wide, flat top surface that supports a large flat-screen television. The console is finished in a light gray color and stands on four angled wooden legs with dark tips, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic. The front of the console has a single round hole, likely for cable management, and an open shelf section beneath the top surface, which contains an electronic device such as a media player or game console. The main body appears to be constructed from engineered wood or MDF, with a smooth, matte finish. The open shelf provides easy access to stored electronics, while the solid lower section offers concealed storage. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban living rooms or entertainment spaces.
description: A sleek, light gray entertainment console with angled wooden legs, open shelving for electronics, and a large flat-screen TV on top. The design is minimalist and modern, with a cable management hole and concealed storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large TV, open shelf with an electronic device, and the cable management hole.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the TV and the depth of the console, with the open shelf visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the TV and the open shelf, with the electronic device more clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the open shelf from a different angle.
